Who We Are

Your Trusted Indianapolis Plumbers

Plumb Doctor started with a simple mission: to provide honest, reliable plumbing services to our neighbors in Indianapolis. We're not just fixing pipes, we're building relationships based on trust and quality workmanship.

We approach every job, big or small, with the same dedication to excellence. Our team uses proven techniques and quality materials to ensure lasting solutions. We explain the problem clearly and offer transparent pricing, so you're always in the know.

We're proud to serve the Indianapolis community. We support local schools and charities, and we're committed to providing fair and ethical service to every homeowner. We're your neighbors, and we treat you like family.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Plumb Doctor

24/7 Emergency Service

Plumbing emergencies don't wait for business hours. We're available around the clock to handle your urgent plumbing needs.

Upfront Pricing

No surprises. We provide clear, detailed estimates before any work begins, so you know exactly what to expect.

Experienced Technicians

Our team of licensed and insured plumbers has the expertise to handle any plumbing challenge, from simple repairs to complex installations.

Guaranteed Satisfaction

We stand behind our work. If you're not completely satisfied with our service, we'll make it right.

Solve Your Plumbing Problems Today!

Call Plumb Doctor for fast, reliable service in Indianapolis and surrounding areas.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Our old water heater finally gave out. Plumb Doctor came out the same day and gave us a fair price on a new one. The installation was quick and professional, and they even hauled away the old unit. Highly recommend!

Sarah M. Water Heater Replacement
“

Had a stubborn clog in our kitchen sink. Plumb Doctor was able to clear it quickly using some kind of special tool. The plumber was friendly and explained everything he was doing. Would use them again.

David K. Drain Cleaning
“

We had a major sewer line issue and were dreading the cost and the mess. Plumb Doctor was able to repair it with minimal digging using a trenchless method. They saved us a ton of money and hassle. Very professional and efficient.

Jennifer L. Sewer Line Repair
“

We suspected a leak in our basement but couldn't find it. Plumb Doctor used some fancy equipment to pinpoint the source of the leak behind a wall. They were able to fix it quickly and prevent further damage. Great service!

Michael B. Leak Detection
“

Plumb Doctor installed a new faucet in our bathroom. The plumber was on time, courteous, and did a great job. The new faucet looks beautiful! The only reason for 4 stars is the price was a little higher than I expected, but the quality of the work was worth it.

Emily R. Fixture Installation
“

Our sump pump failed during a heavy rainstorm. Plumb Doctor came out immediately and replaced it with a new, more powerful model. They saved our basement from flooding! Highly recommend their emergency service.

Robert S. Sump Pump Replacement

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How often should I have my drains cleaned?
We recommend professional drain cleaning every 1-2 years to prevent buildup and blockages. Homes with older plumbing may benefit from more frequent cleaning.
What are the signs of a clogged drain?
Signs of a clogged drain include slow-draining sinks, gurgling sounds, and unpleasant odors. If you notice any of these signs, call Plumb Doctor for prompt service.
Is hydro jetting safe for my pipes?
Yes, hydro jetting is a safe and effective method for clearing stubborn clogs. Our technicians are trained to use hydro jetting equipment safely and effectively without damaging your pipes.
